title: Onboarding - Navigating through onboarding screens
scenario: User can navigate through the three onboarding screens by swiping left/right or tapping the Continue button.
steps: 1. Launch the app after fresh install (onboarding not yet completed).
2. Observe the first onboarding screen ("Organized") is displayed.
4. Verify the second onboarding screen ("Up-to-Date") is displayed.
6. Verify the third onboarding screen ("Personal") is displayed.
8. Verify the second onboarding screen ("Up-to-Date") is displayed again.
expected: User can navigate through all three onboarding screens ("Organized", "Up-to-Date", "Personal") by swiping left/right or tapping the "Continue" button.
